message:
refactor(codegen): Remove redundant hoisted_vars checks

Since isDeclared() already checks hoisted_vars.contains() first,
combined patterns like "isDeclared(x) or hoisted_vars.contains(x)"
and "!isDeclared(x) and !hoisted_vars.contains(x)" are redundant.

This simplifies:
- try_except.zig: 2 patterns simplified
- with.zig: 5 patterns simplified
- for_basic.zig: 5 patterns simplified

hoisted_vars.contains() count: 30 -> 18
